_comment: Single source of truth for the asset pipeline. All generator scripts read from this file. Copy to brand-config.json and edit per client. Do not hardcode any of these values in the generator scripts.

company.name: Autopilot
company.tagline: Your business should run without you.
company._comment: name is used in wordmark text + ARIA labels. legalName goes in footers and PDF metadata. domain is the canonical web URL. tagline is the public-facing one-liner.

colours._comment: primary is the dominant brand colour (backgrounds, headings, structure). accent is the device colour (CTAs, periods, marks — sparingly). offWhite is the warm background. grays are the neutral scale.

body.fallback: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

period._comment: cx/cy are the design-intent coordinates of the period centre in the text-based SVG. The outliner places the <circle> at these coordinates (NOT inside the scaled group).

wordmark._comment_targetTextEndX: Where the text visually ends in the text-based SVG. opentype.js produces narrower native metrics; the outliner calculates scaleFactor = targetTextEndX / nativeTextEndX and wraps the path in <g transform='scale(S)'>.

outputs._comment: filenamePrefix is the slug used in all asset filenames (autopilot-wordmark-navy.svg, autopilot-monogram-navy-bg.png, etc.). Lowercase, hyphenated.

ogCard.manifestoLine: Your business should run without you.

pdfExport._comment: Don't change scale or viewport without re-testing the PDF. 800px viewport at 0.88 scale fits A4 with 10mm margins. Other combinations clip or leave white space.

_comment_locked: Set locked: true after council ratification. lockDate is YYYY-MM-DD. reviewWindowMonths defaults to 12; longer for established brands, shorter for experimental.
